SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE ASSIGNED TO DEPARTMENT 01

JOHN S. CHANG APPEARING FOR PLTF. KAREN A. HENRY APPEARING FOR DEFT. 11:05AM: CASE CALLED FOR JURY TRIAL.PARTIES REACHED A SETTLEMENT ON THE RECORD; STIPULATED JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFFS. POSSESSION OF PREMISES AT 43 29TH STREET; $650.00 IN RENT; FORFEITURE OF AGREEMENT. DEFT. TO PAY PLTF. $100.00 ON THE THE DATE THAT THE JUDGMENT IS SIGNED. PLAINTIFFS WAIVE ALL CLAIMS FOR UNPAID RENT EXCEPT FOR THE $650.00; EACH PARTY TO BEAR THEIR OWN COSTS. EXECTION IS STAYED UNTIL 3/15/94. A WRIT MAY ISSUE AT ANY TIME AFTER DATE OF JUDGMENT. IT WAS ALSO NOTED THAT MICHAEL VOGAN IS A QUEST AND NOT A TENANT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SERRANO, ANTHONY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 43-29TH ST, S.F. $650.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $650.00, STAYED UNTIL MAR-15-1994, LEASE FORFEITED, 5PM. DEFT. TO PAY PLTF. $100.00 AT TIME STIPJ IS SIGNED. (SEE FILE FOR DETAIL)
